calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2008 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-28-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-16-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: July 28, 2008

This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Kevin P. Montee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Medenomics, Inc.
Robert Edelstein, President of Medenomics, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
Defendant Alan Wofsy was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on May 21, 2008.

The Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was read into the record by Mr. Montee. In accordance with the terms of said agreement, defendant Alan Wofsy shall play plaintiff Medenomics, Inc. the sum of $8,500.00. Said amount shall be in the form of a cashier's check, and shall be delivered to plaintiff's counsel no later than August 11, 2008. Plaintiff in turn will dismiss this matter with prejudice upon receipt of the cashier's check.

If defendant fails to comply with the terms of the agreement set forth above, plaintiff may obtain entry of judgment on ex parte application, with 24 hours notice. Said judgment shall be in the amount of $12,811.30, with accrued interest from October 14, 2006.

Matter is continued to September 16, 2008 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the 3.1385 Calendar.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties is approved by the Court.
